evals.prompt: I changed SQLDelight migrations and the app compiles. Verify it actually works before I ship it.
evals.expected_output: The agent should run Gradle checks/builds, install and launch the Android app, preserve installed data, and inspect crash logs for migration failures.

evals.prompt: I updated a Compose screen. Make sure the app still works on Android.
evals.expected_output: The agent should run checks/builds and launch the app on an emulator or connected device, starting an emulator if needed.

evals.prompt: No emulator is running. Verify my Android change anyway.
evals.expected_output: The agent should check devices, start the configured plant-app-test emulator or create it if missing, wait for boot, install, launch, and report blockers if emulator startup fails.
